description_long: This is a full drum kit consisting of a large bass drum, two mounted toms, a floor tom, a snare drum, and a collection of cymbals including hi-hats, crash, and ride cymbals. The drums are supported by metal stands and hardware, with the cymbals mounted on adjustable arms. The shells of the drums are finished in a matte black color, while the drumheads are a light gray, and the cymbals have a metallic brass appearance. The kit is arranged in a standard configuration, suitable for a right-handed player, with the snare and hi-hat positioned to the left and the floor tom to the right. The hardware appears sturdy and functional, with tripod bases for stability. This drum set is typical for use in urban environments such as music venues, street performances, or practice spaces.
description: A complete matte black drum kit with metallic cymbals and sturdy metal hardware, arranged in a standard playable configuration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full drum kit layout, with all drums and cymbals clearly visible and the bass drum centered.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlighting the side of the floor tom, the snare, and the angled toms, with cymbal stands extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the bass drum and toms, with cymbals partially obscured and hardware visible.
description_view_3: Right rear angle showing the floor tom, snare, and the arrangement of cymbals from the opposite side.
